scripts.lint: node --eval "const fs=require('node:fs'); const required=['data/rails.json','specs/rails.schema.json','packages/api/src/rails.ts','apps/web/app/api/public/rails/route.ts','apps/web/app/api/public/funding-intents/route.ts','apps/web/app/api/public/payout-requests/route.ts','apps/web/app/funding/page.tsx','tests/rails.test.mjs','.env.example']; const missing=required.filter((file)=>!fs.existsSync(file)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing required files: ' + missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('Lint passed: M20 wallet-rails files are present.');"
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @menamarket/ui run build && npm --workspace @menamarket/api run build
